key_insights.insight: To develop your unique creative voice, immerse yourself in a wide range of genres and 'steal' the best parts.
key_insights.quote: Listen to as much music, and all of it...Steal the best parts of all of it and you will find yourself.

key_insights.insight: Persistence in the face of rejection builds resilience and provides essential humility and appreciation when success arrives.
key_insights.quote: Half of that 10 years gave me humility, gave me appreciation for when it would happen, I would be appreciative and I would still have humility.

key_insights.insight: Define your priorities clearly and ensure your actions align with those priorities, even if it means financial sacrifices.
key_insights.quote: I answer it with action. So I have probably, I have probably made my tours, I would say financially, maybe one of the most irresponsible tours in all of touring. So I started a rule where I said, I will do three weeks on, two weeks off

key_insights.insight: Sometimes, the most significant shifts in perspective come from experiencing profound personal challenges.
key_insights.quote: My son's cancer diagnosis rocked my world. It pulled a curtain from over my eyes.

key_insights.insight: True wealth lies in faith, family, and friendships, not material possessions.
key_insights.quote: Rich is having a strong faith. Rich is having a great family and loving your family. Rich is having great friendships because those rich things they're talking about, the money, the people that I know that have the most stuff are the most miserable people that I know.

key_insights.insight: Embracing vulnerability and authenticity can lead to deeper connections with audiences, even when it involves self-deprecation.
key_insights.quote: We want you to be your idiot stuff.

key_insights.insight: Successful people never really fit in and that is how their uniqueness propels them
key_insights.quote: But isn't not belonging how you end up doing these kind of numbers? Because if you were more of the same artistically, vocally, you wouldn't have all these Grammys and all the, you know, best-selling six multi-platinum albums five grammy awards more billions of streams than i could possibly countstream myself a lot yeah but i go if you were if you were like everybody else you wouldn't havethose achievements

actionable_advice.advice: Emulate and 'steal' from diverse sources to cultivate your unique style.
actionable_advice.how_to: Deliberately expose yourself to a wide range of music, art, or other creative works, identifying elements that resonate with you and experimenting with incorporating them into your own work.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize family by structuring work commitments to allow for regular returns home.
actionable_advice.how_to: Negotiate shorter tour legs or project schedules with built-in breaks to maintain consistent presence with loved ones.

actionable_advice.advice: Challenge your 'false self' or ego by actively seeking honesty and self-awareness.
actionable_advice.how_to: Regularly engage in introspection, perhaps through journaling or meditation, and solicit honest feedback from trusted individuals to identify areas for personal growth.

actionable_advice.advice: Embrace new platforms for reaching audiences that were previously unreachable
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively use and contribute authentically to social media platforms. Connect and interact with followers.

memorable_stories: Michael's grandfather trading plumbing work for singing lessons.
The assistant telling him to give up
David Wally signing him after listening to the demo
contrarian_claims: It's okay to 'steal' from many rather than innovate.
It's okay to make 'financially irresponsible' decisions in touring to prioritize family.
Having children late in one's career can lead to having a new appreciation of the season's in your own life cycle
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Michael Bublé: "I Will NEVER Be Carefree Again!", Cancer Diagnosis, Dealing With Rejection & Being Mr Christmas!
